initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'speed' 
  AND ha.attribute_value = (SELECT MAX(attribute_value) FROM hero_attribute ha2 JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'speed');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'speed' 
  AND ha.attribute_value = (SELECT MAX(attribute_value) FROM hero_attribute ha2 JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'speed');

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'speed' 
AND ha.attribute_value = (SELECT MAX(ha2.attribute_value) 
                          FROM hero_attribute ha2
                          JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id
                          WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'speed');
